diagrams.title: Cloud Service Models Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows the division of responsibilities between Cloud Service Provider and Customer across IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS models
diagrams.purpose: Understanding shared responsibility model and security ownership

diagrams.title: Cloud Deployment Models
diagrams.description: Visual representation of Public, Private, Hybrid, and Community cloud deployment types
elements: Public Cloud: Shared infrastructure, third-party owned, accessible via internet
Private Cloud: Dedicated infrastructure, single organization, on-premise or hosted
Hybrid Cloud: Combines private and public, data/workloads move between them
Community Cloud: Shared by organizations with common requirements, governed by group
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different cloud deployment options and their characteristics
